channel.title: int.compter
channel.description: int.compter ── 铭恩的个人电台:设计、AI 硬件与创业的一线思考,由他的个人上下文驱动。
channel.itunes:author: 铭恩
channel.itunes:summary: int.compter ── 铭恩的个人电台:设计、AI 硬件与创业的一线思考,由他的个人上下文驱动。

item.title: Google Pixel 10a Isai Blue — Art Meets Technology
item.description: Two hosts discuss Google's Japan-exclusive Pixel 10a Isai Blue, a collaboration with Heralbony that celebrates diversity through art and technology.
item.itunes:summary: Two hosts discuss Google's Japan-exclusive Pixel 10a Isai Blue, a collaboration with Heralbony that celebrates diversity through art and technology.
